title: Active Lane Control Matrix
summary: Compacted the selected-lane HUD controls into one bounded command matrix, grouping the micro chronicle, view portals, transition meter, and lane switch chips into a tighter game-control deck.
goalFit: Moves the selected lane away from stacked rows and toward a premium game cockpit where status, navigation, and lane switching feel like one control surface.
proof: web/app.js wraps the micro chronicle, view portals, transition meter, and switch deck in active-lane-control-matrix
web/styles.css lays out the matrix as a compact two-column command deck with mobile fallback
web/data/snapshot.json records the unlock in the platform engineering lane after regeneration
